name: John Doe
history: History of recurring conflicts and strained relationships. Ongoing trust and boundary issues in relationships. Some relationships involve alcoholism. History of aggressive behavior.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: If I am not in control, I will be rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I am rejected, it means I am inherently flawed.
coping_strategies: Attempts to control social situations to avoid feelings of rejection.
situation: Spending holidays alone and reflecting on feelings of sadness and loneliness.
auto_thought: I am always going to be alone.
behavior: Withdrawal from social situations and overreaction to perceived slights.
